feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Calculate after aggregation based on datasphere
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

   I am trying to calculate the difference of GP% between current year and last year. But the formula behave kind of weird. Here is our sample data:

We have calculated the GP% for 2024/08 and 2024/07 in the Analytic Model of Datasphere and it worked just fine(Green). But when it come to SAC story to calculate difference of 2 years, instead of simply minus one from the other, it seem to firstly calculate the difference of each SALES/COST/GP(Orange) and then calculate GP/SALES(Red) which is wrong. What we need is the calculation after aggregation which is just simply 0.42 - 0.37. 

Any suggestion?

We are using live connection from SAC to Datasphere, I've tried to create calculated measures both in the view and analytic model but neither of them worked. 

Appendix 1: Using Exception Aggregation for all fields in the Analytic Model

entry.title: SAC & Datasphere - Suppress Popup
entry.content:
Hello,

when i open a Story in SAC which is based on Datasphere Model a popup shows up when the story is loading

 

Is there a way to suppress it?

 

Kr

Ben

entry.title: Customized Mail Alerts in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Experts(Datasphere)

Is there any flexibility to print record count in Email Notification from Datasphere Task Chain.

My requirement is to print Valid and Invalid record count in the Email Notification for Business awareness.

Please let me know if there any such option in SAP Datasphere Email Notification.

Thanks,

Balu

entry.title: SAP Datasphere: Enabling Multiple Selection on Variable (Prompt) Screen
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need help enabling multiple selections on SAP Datasphere's prompt screen at the analytical model level. Currently, we can only make a single selection.

We need users to be able to select multiple years, such as 2023 and 2024, as well as ACT and PLN planning categories, so they can compare the two periods.

I've included screenshots showing the current expression in the filter and the prompt screens. Please advise. Thank you. SAP Datasphere

entry.title: How to archive historical data in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,

 

As we prepare for the year-end, we need to archive data from 2022. There are approximately 300 million records that require archiving to make space for the new financial year. Does anyone know how to accomplish this within SAP Datasphere?

 

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Activate Integration & Exception in Cloud ALM for SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
How do i activate Data Collection for SAP Datasphere in SAP Cloud ALM


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Order of the primary key columns in Datasphere Tables
entry.content:
Hi Datasphere Experts,

I am creating a replication flow to bring SAP HANA data into Datasphere and dump it into a table I created. When I deploy the replication flow I get this error:

I have found that:

  1. the order of the table key in SAP is exactly the same as the order of the created table.
  2. The data type is exactly the same.
  3. The rest of the selected fields keep the same order as the original table.
  4. The fields are named the same and are automatically mapped in the replication flow projection.

El error lo da en el momento en el que despliego el flujo de replicación.

What other checks could you make to solve the problem?

Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Replication of HANA Views from on prem HANA to datasphere
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have on prem HANA with HANA Views (Graphical, table function based SQL based with variables and input parameters ), we don't want to develop all HANA views again in datasphere. we thought of levergaing remote tables option. So we created SDI(DPagent), SDA cloud connector based on premise HANA Connections. When i am importing HANA Views as remote tables from  _SYS_BIC. i am able to see structure. But  Input parameters and variables are not getting passed to datasphere?  wherever we have mandatory Input parameters and variables we see errors and no data. did any one faced same issue? any issue with my connectors? any other alternative solution?.

Thanks for reading this and i appreciate and welcome your inputs.

Regards,

Joe

entry.title: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need to create multiple database users in space management (database user related to a space).

The request is to have a user mapping from a Front end BI Tool so I can use datasphere DAC to manage row securities.

The editor lets you create one user at time,

And the bad part is that passwords are auto-generated, most of the time with characters that are not accepted by the front end tool.
I need to create around 350 users.

Does some sort of SAML / SSO exists for database users?
As far as I know Datasphere's database is a "self-managed" hana cloud so we can not create users from there and assign correct roles to see space data.

Do you have any hint?

Thanks,

Alberto

entry.title: Filter latest log time from log data
entry.content:
Hello,

I have list of users, log data and log time when something was change in there accounts. 
I want to filter data in my model that I will see only latest log time for every users in every days.
I'm thinking about adding a script in Datapshere - GREATEST, but I don't know how to use it. 

Could you help me? Or maybe you know some different way to filter data like I want?

Thanks

entry.title: Install HANA DP Agent on Linux, Error Segmentation fault (core dumped)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I installed HANA DP Agent on a Linux linux/amd64 (ubuntu:22.04) based docker image and get the following error when opening agentcli.sh:

 

dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$ cd HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64/
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent/HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64$ ./hdbinst --silent --batch --path="/usr/sap/dataprovagent" --agent_listener_port=5050 --agent_admin_port=5051
SAP HANA Data Provisioning Agent installation kit detected.


SAP HANA Lifecycle Management - dataprovagent Installation 2.7.5.0.0
********************************************************************


Checking installation...
Preparing package 'dataprovagent'...
Preparing package 'Installer'...
Installing SAP HANA Data Provisioning Agent to /usr/sap/dataprovagent...
Installing package 'dataprovagent'...
Installing package 'Installer'...
#####################################################################
IMPORTANT NOTE:
#####################################################################
You have installed Data Provisioning Agent with default settings. The default settings use insecure channel to communicate with HANA server. For secure communication, SSL settings must be configured via the Data Provisioning Agent Configuration tool after the installation is complete. Please see SAP HANA Smart Data Integration Installation and Configuration Guide for details on configuring SSL between the Agent and HANA server.
#####################################################################
Installation done
Log file written to '/var/tmp/hdb_dataprovagent_2024-09-24_08.27.13_23/hdbinst_dataprovagent.log' on host 'cf985f15681e'.
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent/HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64$ cd ..
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$ ls
DataAssurance                IMDB_DPAGENT200_07P_50-70002516.ZIP  SIGNATURE.SMF  adapters    artifacts.xml  camel          doc      dpagent.ini        dpproxy  features  krb5  log       p2       sapjvm  ssl  versions.txt  workspace
HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64  LogReader                            Trigger        agentutils  bin            configuration  dpagent  dpagentconfig.ini  ds-lite  install   lib   manifest  plugins  sec     ui   webservice
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$ ./bin/agentcli.sh --configAgent 
./bin/agentcli.sh: 4: [[: not found
Configuring the Agent at the following location:
/usr/sap/dataprovagent

./bin/agentcli.sh: 15: [[: not found
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$

 

Does anyone had the issue regarding "Segmentation fault (core dumped)"?

Thank you and best regards
Tim

// Logfile attached

entry.title: Request ID in Replication Flows
entry.content:
Hi,

we want to store in a local table (which is the target of a replication flow) a kind of request id (like in BW). With a data flow, I could achieve this with a calculated column. I can set a date time field for the current timestamp (which can differ on each record because the data flow takes time).

I thought about a custom annotation or something similar. Has anyone an idea?

Best regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Converting dimensional Attributes into Fact Measures
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

is it possible to transform dimensional Attributes into Fact Measures without joining them in into the Fact table ?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere basic trial - login issue
entry.content:
Hi

I can't login with below details and I getting session ended with in a second.

Thanks for your interest in SAP Datasphere! You’ve just taken your first step towards unleashing the power of your business data.

First things first, here are your account details:

Your User ID: GE118697
Your Password: ObB58a7GbV1!

We’ve also included a guide with some helpful steps as you’re getting started.

You will have access to this basic trial for 30 days.

Over the next month, we’ll be checking in with a few tips and reminders to help you get the most from your basic trial.

Thanks,

Kanna.

entry.title: BW to datasphere questions
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I come from a BW background, so please excuse my “old-school” approach!

We are starting a project in SAP Datasphere, and I have a few questions:

1. Can we simulate BEx exit variables (step 1 and step 2) in Datasphere? If so, where would be the best place to implement them – in the Analytical View or Fact View? Or should it be handled elsewhere?
2. We have a requirement similar to BEx with two structures, and another requirement involving custom cell-level logic. How can we manage this in Datasphere? Which layer should we handle this in? This is for cashflow reports that require a high level of customization, which I could typically do quickly in BEx.
3. Is it possible to implement a “rule type” concept in Datasphere? If so, how can this be achieved?

We are using SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) as the reporting tool, and we prefer to use Datasphere as the main design concept. However, if you think any of these requirements are better managed in SAC,please let me know.

Thanks a million

regards

entry.title: Datasphere - Last Logon Time
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a table I can use in the Sys Schema to get a Datasphere's user last logon time?

entry.title: Issue with Large Data Extraction from SAP B1 via SAP DataSphere: Socket Closed Error
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'd like to briefly explain my current situation and the issue I'm facing.

I'm extracting data from a legacy system (SAP B1) using SAP DataSphere. SAP B1 uses SQL Server, and the connection, including the agent, is working fine, as I have successfully extracted smaller tables without any issues.

However, when I try to extract data from the OCRD table, which contains approximately 500,000 records, the process fails and returns the following message:
Runtime error occurred. See log for more details.
Group messages:
Group: default;
Messages: Graph failure: producer1 failed with the following error: Socket closed.
Process(es) terminated with error(s).

I would greatly appreciate any suggestions or ideas on how to resolve this issue.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: How to Automate Datasphere CLI using python
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to automate the Datasphere CLI using python.

Example: As per the below blog via CLI it's manual activity.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/use-crud-opreations-with-sap-datasphere-command-line-interface/ba-p/13682690

Suppose there is scenario, we have 50 replication flows, i want to update some content in JSON file. Manual Activity takes more time. So by using Python we are able to do it but authentication is blocking for manual intervention. While automate each command it is asking some token code. To streamline this process, please suggest some steps to bypassing the authentication step through automation using Python.

entry.title: Datasphere source system assignment pointing to Dev after moving to Qual system for replication flow
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a situation where our replications flows are pointing to Dev systems after moving to quality systems.

with on prem we have BDLS which take cares of Mapping but in cloud solution what is the approach? 

anyone have faced similar kind of issues?

Regards,

Raj

entry.title: Advice on Reducing DHCDC_RTSTORE Table Size in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Good day everyone,

We are currently consuming SAP business content in our Datasphere environment, with data being replicated from our on-premise S/4HANA system via replication flows.

Today, my SAP Basis team informed me that the DHCDC_RTSTORE table in S/4HANA has significantly increased in size. They have asked if there's a way to clean up or reduce the space used by this table.

Does anyone have experience or suggestions on how to handle this?

Thank you in advance for your help

 

SAP Datasphere
